description_long: This is a rectangular gravestone or headstone, typically found in cemeteries or graveyards. The main body is upright and arched at the top, mounted on a thick rectangular base. The front face features a prominent cut-out in the shape of a Latin cross, adding a religious and decorative element. The surface appears to be made of smooth, slightly weathered stone, with subtle variations in shading that suggest age and exposure to the elements. There are no visible inscriptions or engravings apart from the cross. The overall design is simple, solemn, and functional, suitable for marking a burial site in an urban or park setting.
description: A rectangular, arched gravestone with a cut-out Latin cross on the front, made of smooth, weathered stone and mounted on a thick base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the upright stone and the rectangular base.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the arched top and the prominent Latin cross cut-out.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the stone's thickness and base.
description_view_3: Rear view of the gravestone, showing a plain, unadorned surface with no cross or inscriptions.
